message:
fix(fr-runtime): SLOWLOG GET error wording matches upstream [bd-frankenredis-slgcount, slgary]

Two SLOWLOG GET wording divergences:

- SLOWLOG GET <non-numeric>: fr returned the generic 'value is
  not an integer or out of range'; upstream slowlog.c emits
  'count should be greater than or equal to -1' for both
  unparseable counts and explicit values below -1.

- SLOWLOG GET 10 EXTRA: fr returned the generic wrong-arity
  reply; upstream emits the subcommand-specific 'unknown
  subcommand or wrong number of arguments for GET. Try SLOWLOG
  HELP.'.

Updates the slowlog_rejects_invalid_shapes_and_negative_count
test to assert the new wording.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
